title: verbascum stenostachyum
intro: Verbascum stenostachyum, also known as Turkish mullein, is a perennial plant species in the figwort family native to the mountainous regions of Turkey and Eastern Europe. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Turkish mullein include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and relieving symptoms of allergies and sinus infections. Herbal preparations of Verbascum stenostachyum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
